name: high_vol_alternating_intraday_ranges
description: All days close at exactly 100, but intraday range alternates: even days have H=110/L=90 (range 20), odd days have H=120/L=80 (range 40). Since closes are constant, |H-Cprev| and |L-Cprev| reduce to (H-100) and |L-100| -- always <= half the range -- so TR = H-L on every day. Tests TR computation when the H-L term dominates the max().
